title: Daily Independent Journal — March 11, 1960 (Page 7)
author: Daily Independent Journal
card_summary: A clipped page from the Daily Independent Journal (San Rafael, California), dated Friday, March 11, 1960, page 7. Likely related to Philip K. Dick or his local environment during his years living in the San Rafael, Marin County area.
page_summary:
A scanned newspaper page from the Daily Independent Journal (San Rafael, California), dated Friday, March 11, 1960, page 7. The clipping was sourced from Newspapers.com and downloaded on April 9, 2025. The PDF text layer contains only source metadata with no recoverable article text.

Dick resided in the San Rafael area during this period, and the Daily Independent Journal served as the primary local newspaper for Marin County. The year 1960 fell within Dick's most prolific period of novel writing. Clippings from this newspaper are preserved in the archive to document the local context of Dick's life and the community in which he was embedded during this productive creative period.
